clusters.justification: This domain captures the integration of valence, arousal, and autonomic processing that typically maps onto co-activations within macro-scale limbic and salience-related systems.
These terms represent the goal-directed computation of utility, reinforcement, and incentive characteristics subserved by large-scale striatal and ventromedial prefrontal network co-activations.
This domain bridges self-referential processing with the representation of other agents, representing the core functional neuro-ontology of the default mode network.
